settings.offer_subline: Add this necklace to your bag and we include two complimentary coordinating pieces (finish subject to availability). Offer applies to this product only — configure matching discounts in Shopify Admin.
settings.rail_dek: Every frame is from our latest campaign — texture, color, and the way the amulet sits in real life.
settings.story_band_sub: A quiet ritual of color, craft, and pieces that feel chosen — not mass-made.
settings.story_card_1_text: Heart amulets with hand-balanced enamel tones — precious, never loud.
settings.story_card_2_text: Rope chain and weight made for daily wear — shower-to-street, always soft.
settings.story_card_3_text: Designed to feel like a gift to yourself — or someone you love deeply.
settings.story_voice_lead: I design for women who want jewelry to feel personal — warm, a little joyful, never loud, never generic.
settings.delivery_fineprint: Business days, excludes holidays. Refreshes on each visit.
settings.eyebrow: Christine de Levigne · Handmade in small batches
settings.short_descriptor: A heart amulet to wear close to the skin — soft Mediterranean color, a rope chain, and the warmth of something made to keep.
settings.handmade_note: Each piece is finished by hand in small runs — slight variations are part of its character.
settings.intro_heading: Meant to live against the skin
settings.emotional_intro: What you wear closest to your skin should feel chosen. This necklace is a small, personal object — soft in silhouette, vivid in a quiet way — like a little sunlit accent on calm neutrals.
settings.variant_color_story: Pick the finish that feels like you. Each tone is balanced to read precious, not loud — a whisper of coral, lagoon, or bloom against the rope chain and heart.
settings.atelier_note: Every piece is assembled and finished by hand in small runs. Slight variations are part of the character — they keep the work feeling alive, tactile, and quietly precious.
settings.details_intro: Plain language, honest materials — so you know what you are bringing home.
settings.row_structure_value: Zinc alloy, rope chain, heart pendant
settings.size_copy:
Length: adjustable, about 30–66 cm (11.8–25.98 in) around the neck.

Pendant: about 3.5 cm (1.37 in) tall — present without overwhelming.

Wear it higher or lower with different necklines.
settings.shipping_copy:
Made to order in 2–3 days, then ships in 5–7 business days. Easy 30-day returns if it is not right for you.

Care: store dry, keep away from perfume and lotion on the chain, polish with a soft cloth.
settings.founder_note: Christine de Levigne is a quiet jewelry atelier — intimate, handmade, guided by Mediterranean color. No cold, distant luxury here: only pieces that feel warm, personal, and worth keeping.
settings.gift_note: It arrives feeling considered — lovely for birthdays, milestones, or a soft “thinking of you.” Add a gift note at checkout if your store supports it.
